chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 35 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26. 2. For orders on CMA No.422/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. This reference is pending since 2021 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today, after four years, brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of the applicant. In view judgment reported as PLD 2020 SC 518 [CIR vs. Rafeh Limited], this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
